upasargachandrika.example_text: 'SAntAM tasmE pradAsyati svakAM duhitaraM BAryAm' (rA॰1.8.25)
'pra vAM Gftasya nirRijo dadIran' (f॰7.64.1)
'aTEnaM mAtre pradAya stanaM prayacCati' (Sa॰brA॰14.9.4.28) atrodAhftizu praSabdena nArTaH
'hutaSezaM pradadyAttu BAjanezu (yAjYa॰1.236) nikzipedityarTaH
'AjYApaya kimeteByaH pradAyaM dIyatAm iti' (BA॰ASrama॰14.9) pradAyaH=dAyaH=pradeSanam upadA upAyanamupagrAhyam
'pradAnaM pradAya yAjayitavyameva' (Sa॰brA॰12.8.1.17)
'yadi vAcaM pradAsyAmi dvijAtiriva saMskftAm' (rA0 52018) pradAsyAmi uccArayizyAmi vyAharizyAmi vakzyAmi
'yaTA vatsena prattAM gAM duhe' (tE0 saM0 23623) prattAM kzIraM dAtumArabDAm prasnutastanImiti yAvat AdikarmaRi nizWA praSabdaScAdikarmaRo dyotakaH
'prattA vE gOrduhe' (tE0 saM0 1713) ukto'rTaH
'kAmodakaM saKi prattAsvasrIyaSvaSurartvijAm' (yAjYa0 34) prattA pariRItA datteti tvakzarArTaH kAmodakaM kArya kAme pretAByudayakAmanAyAM satyAmiti mitAkzarA
'lubDaM hanyAtsaMpradAnena nityam' (BA0 SAM0 12047) sampradAnena=upagrAhyEH upadABiH
'ahanyahani cApyevaM yAcatAM sampradIyate' (BA0 vana0 9521) sampradIyate=vitIryate pradiSyate
'tasmE vasavaH prAtaH savanaM samprayacCanti' (CA0 u0 2246) samprayacCanti pradadati
'kumAraM mAtApitarO triH samprayacCete' (ko0 sU0 54) samprayacCete=anyonyasmE pradattaH dARaH prayoge praSabdaH sampro vA prAyeRa samaM vyavahriyete
'hiraRyaM sampradAyaM zoqaSinA stuvate' (tARqya0 1213) sampradAyam=pradAya sampradAyamiti Ramulantam

'sampradAyEva tezAM' (karma0) (BA0 u0 2725) praRamya BagavatpAdAn SrIDarAdIMSca sadgurUn sampradAyAnusAreRa gItABAzyaM samAraBe.. sampradAyaH=guruSizyAnukrameRa prAptaH SAstropadeSaH asampradattA (kanyA)=pitrA vivAhe'dattA anUQeti yAvat
'dIyatAM sampradAnam' (rA0 41134) prItidAnam ityAha
'AtmanaH sampradAnena martyo mftyumupASnute' (BA0 SAM0 2468) sampradAnena=vizayeByaH samarpaRena
'sa tadAnIM mahAbudDirmahamUdaM madodDatam taddurgadvitayIdAnasampradAnamamanyata' (Si0 BA0 1546).. sampradAnaM sampradIyate'smA iti pratigrahotocyate
'marudByaH sampraditsAMcakAra' (ni0 1513) dAtumiyeza
'aTAtaH samprattiH' (bfha0 u0 1517) samprattiH sampradAnam
'ftvija ftuyAjAnyajantyasampradAyam' (E0 brA0 59) asampradAyam anyasmA adattvA Ramulantametat
'dIyatAM sampradAnaM ca parizvajya ca vAnarAn' (rA0 41134) sampradAnaM deyadravyam
'dakziRAM vyadadAttezAM karmiRAM tadanantaram prAcIM hotre dadO' (goresiyo saM0 rA0 11339) vyadadAt=viBajyAdadAt
'vi mahacCarma yacCa' (aTarva0 1203) viyacCa=viSezeRa prayacCa
'vi manyo Sarma yacCa' (f0 101525) ukto'rTaH
'tezAM yaTAguRamAvasaTAH SazpAnnapAnaM ca videyam' (Apa0 Da0 2259) videyaM viSezeRa deyam
'anugrahaM kuru viBo vidAyaM dehi sAmpratam' (brahmavE0 12339) viSizwo dAyo vidAyaH
'hastO pfRasva bahuBirvasavyErAprayacCa dakziRAdota savyAt' (aTarva0 7288) AprayacCa ABimuKyena dehItyarTaH
'sahasraM vE prati puruzaH paSUnAM prati yacCati' (tE0 saM0) puruzaH sahasrasya paSUnAM BAreRa tulyaBAro BavatItyarTaH
'tileByaH prati yacCati mAzAn' (pA0 2311 ityatrodAharaRam) tilAnAdAya tadarTe mAzAn dadAti iha pratiH karmapravacanIyaH
'etadAdAya te prARAn pratidAsyanti pARqavAH' (BA0 sO0 1527) pratidAsyanti=praRidAsyanti vinimAsyante
'manyasva naradevAya jAnakI pratidIyatAm' (rA0 55121) AttapUrvAyAH sItAyA dAnaM pratidAnam jAnakI pratyarpyatAmityarTaH
'adyApi kopavimuKIkftagantukAmA noktaM vacaH pratidadAti yaTEva pUrvam' (cOra0 36) uktaM vaco na pratidadAti na pratisandiSatItyarTaH
'sandeSaM pratidAsyAmi vizRoH' (hari0 7250) pratisandeSaM dAsyAmItyarTaH
'pratidAsyAmi Bagavan pu~lliNgaM tava suvrata' (BA0 u0 1926) pUrvamAttaM pratyarpayizyAmItyarTaH
'dattEzA BavatA mahyaM tAM te pratidadAmyaham' (BA0 ASva0 8917) ukto'rTaH
'ihEva santaH prati dadma enat' (aTarva0 61172) enadfRaM pratidadmo vigaRayAmaH pratiniryAtayAmaH

'yatra KalvekaH pratyAdeyaM dadAti dvitIyaSca pratideyaM gfhRAti tatrAsya dfzwatvAtpraDAnamfRaSabdaH' (nyA0 sU0 4160 BA0) pratideyaM punardeyam pumAnupaniDirnyAsaH pratidAnaM tadarpaRam ityamaraH pratIpaM dAnaM pratidAnamiti svAmI
'tasmAdapi vaDyaM prapannaM na pratiprayacCanti' (tE0 saM0 65829-30) na pratiprayacCanti na pratyarpayanti

prayoga.literature_text: patraM puzpaM PalaM toyaM yo me BaktyA prayacCati
ftvigByo hi dadO rAjA tAM DarAm
gavAM SatasahasrARi daSa teByo dadO nfpaH
tAsAM dadO rAjA BAryARAM pAyasaM pfTak
kanyAratnaM dadO rAma tAwakAM nAma nAmataH
aTa rAjA videhAnAM dadO kanyADanaM bahu
yasya no dAsyati pitA sa no BartA
prayacCa tvaM pfTivIM vA DanAni ca
